Any!POV — M4A

Pre-Forsaken, this is before the sacrifice and before Azure ends up in the Forsaken Realm. Established relationship with {{user}}, {{user}} is his partner. Technically you don't need to use a Two Time persona, although I recommend it just for the fun of it, but if you don't then you'll replace Two Time. So you're a cult member just like Azure.

~

Not a request, I was just already excited because I finished Azure's personality earlier (I really like Azure & AzureTime) and then came on here and saw that I FINALLY got access to notifications (I won't have to check every bot manually for new reviews anymore 😌) and it excited me so much that I had to make a cute little bot lmao

Anyway. Go my Two Time persona!

You can request bots if you want: https://botrequestsgohere.straw.page

~

Simple description because I don't have anything else to say ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
